name: splunk-viz-packs
description: Build fully themed Splunk custom visualization apps — branded viz suites with shared design tokens, Canvas 2D rendering, webpack bundling, and AppInspect-ready packaging. Takes brand context (palette, fonts, tone) and produces installable Splunk apps with multiple custom vizs sharing one design system. Output: tarball ready for Splunk Cloud or Enterprise. Pairs with splunk-dashboard-studio plugin for dashboard JSON that uses the custom vizs.
